stem: Line m is parallel to line n, and line t is a transversal intersecting both. At the intersection of t and m, an angle measures 150°. At the intersection of t and n, an angle measuring w° is in the corresponding position to the 150° angle. What is the value of w?
rationale: Choice C is correct. When parallel lines are cut by a transversal, corresponding angles are congruent. Therefore w = 150.
